texto: Every once in a while, large cities have narrow streets, silent passageways that allow your footsteps to echo in the stillness of the night, and it seems like everything is going back to the way it was, when there were only a few of us and we all knew each other and greeted each other on the street.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jaume Cabré: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Every once in a while, large cities have narrow streets, silent passageways that allow your foots…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, atavism, loneliness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
